title: Oregon State Application — Final Three Essays
html:
The polished Jan-26 version of Yahir's Oregon State application — three essays: (1) the alcoholism / forgiveness obstacle essay, (2) the COVID 19 community-disruption essay (family restaurant in crisis · mom losing her job · Yahir taking a full-time job at mini pet mart), (3) the optional "additional info" essay re-framing the early-high-school grade slip as a self-directed business education (stocks, bitcoin, FBLA state-investing 3rd place). This is the v2 of the Jan-7 draft and the canonical version that got submitted.

TL;DR

  • Final OSU essays cover the alcoholism arc, the COVID-19 family-restaurant collapse + mom's unemployment, and the academic-redemption pivot — three distinct angles on the same "I am self-made" frame.
  • The mini pet mart full-time-job episode (5 months, redirected every dollar to family) becomes the load-bearing "I stepped up" anecdote that recurs in JCEF and JCEF applications.
  • Self-directed business education path named explicitly: stock market investing · bitcoin · "What makes a great CEO?" — the seeds of the crypto interest that surfaces later in the same year.
  • The line "my connection with peers has been through the iPhone game among us" dates this essay precisely to early-pandemic 2020-21 social fabric.
  • Cites FBLA state 3rd-place in investing as the proof-of-effort credential alongside the YEBW Nick Fisher Award.

Key quote

"Hardships like the ones in my life have taught me that the most valuable component is in the manner in which one responds to those events."

Why it matters in the graph

This is the submitted OSU application, so it's the canonical narrative version of the alcoholism + COVID + self-taught-business arc that gets reused (often verbatim) across the entire scholarship essay cycle. Pair with 2021 01 07 Oregon State App 1 (first draft) and the JCEF / Renaissance / Ford applications to see the same modular sentences move between docs.

Open questions

  • Did Yahir actually intend to pursue business analytics or was it the most-acceptable major name for AI-curious applicants in 2021?
  • The COVID essay paints a near-total restaurant collapse — how close did gtanos actually come to closing?

Connections

  • 2021 01 07 Oregon State App 1 — earlier draft of the same essays.
  • 2021 01 26 Renaissance Scholarship · 2021 02 24 Ford Family Foundation Scholarship · 2021 02 26 JCEF Scholarships — sibling apps in the same essay cycle.
  • osu · mini pet mart · gtanos · fbla · yebw · alcoholism in the family · covid pandemic era · among us · bitcoin · business analytics
